# Team A working notes

A stray markdown file with no numeric prefix — not an ADR, not the index,
just ordinary notes living next to real decisions. Must be surfaced in
`ctx.unrecognizedFiles`, not silently dropped (ADR-0007): whether a file
like this is legitimately non-ADR or a real decision this tool's naming
heuristic missed is a human's call, not something to guess silently either
way.
